SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
GanttChartGUI
 
GanttChartGUITest
Unit tests for GanttChartGUI focusing on CPU/disk block handling, rendering behavior and internal execution block creation.
InputParser
Class responsible for reading and decoding the input file.
InputParserTest
Unit tests for InputParser ensuring robust parsing of irregular input files, handling of missing files, and correct extraction of configuration and process data.
Logger
Listens to engine events and writes text messages to a physical file (output.txt).
LoggerTest
Unit tests for Logger verifying basic write behavior, robustness when writers are unavailable, and coverage of no-op interface methods.
Main
 
MemoryManager
Manages the system RAM memory and manually implements the LRU (Least Recently Used) page replacement policy without using Java libraries.
MemoryReplacementStrategy
Interfata care defineste contractul pentru algoritmul de inlocuire a paginilor in RAM.
Process
Abstract class defining the structure and base state of a process in the system.
Processor
Represents a physical processing unit (CPU) within the simulator.
ProcessorTest
Unit tests for Processor ensuring correct assignment, eviction, time slice handling, and resilience when idle.
ProcessState
 
Scheduler
Implements the Round-Robin scheduling algorithm with processor affinity.
SchedulingStrategy
Interfata care defineste contractul pentru algoritmul de planificare a procesorului.
SimulationConfig
The SimulationConfig class stores the immutable parameters of the simulation.
SimulationConfigTest
Unit tests for SimulationConfig.
SimulationEngine
The main engine of the simulation (The Clock).
SimulationEngineTest
It uses Mockito for dependency isolation and Java Reflection to access private members.
SimulationEventListener
Interface used to decouple the simulation engine from the display systems.
SystemProcess
Represents the system process (the simulator's VIP).
SystemProcessTest
Unit tests for SystemProcess validating periodic release, I/O handling, queue behavior and resilience under load.
UserProcess
Represents a process launched by a user within the system.
